headline: Shares of semiconductors companies are trading higher amid overall market gain as supply chain concerns eased after the U.S. and Iran reached a ceasefire deal. Also, President Trump's social media post over the proposed 15-point agenda further lifted sentiments

headline: Texas Instruments Acquisition Resets Capex Path And Free Cash Flow Outlook
summary: Texas Instruments (NasdaqGS:TXN) announced a US$7.5b acquisition of Silicon Labs, marking a major portfolio and scale change for the analog and embedded processing business. The company has also reduced its 2026 capital expenditure guidance, with management pointing to improved free cash flow and significant cost synergies tied to the integration.
